title: Cape Coast heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Cape Coast, with a Z-Score of +3.03. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Cape Coast is causing significant discomfort to the residents, with high temperatures and humidity levels. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue for the next few days, with no signs of relief in sight. 
 The city's infrastructure is being put to the test, with increased demand for electricity and water.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
